title: Sprint-K H12: Board-State-Machine Bug-Fix — /complete guard + admin-close semantic + canceled-to-done recovery
description:
Agent-Role-Declaration: Operator (pieter_pan) -> Forge (sre-expert)

Handoff: Analyse → Umsetzung
Scope: Sprint-K H12 — Fix 2 related Board-State-Machine-Bugs discovered during 2026-04-20 morning recovery. Both live-case verified. Goal: Ghost-Stalled-Tasks bei erfolgreicher Code-Reality können als status=done geschlossen werden, nicht erzwungen canceled/failed.

Done: H1, H4, H6, H7, H11 sauber deployed; H2/H5 rolled back, pending re-impl; 3 State-Machine-Bugs dokumentiert in morning-recovery-report-2026-04-20.md.

Open: 2 konkrete Bugs in mission-control API-Routes:

Bug A: /complete endpoint rejects mit terminal-transition-conflict auch bei workerSessionId=none. Non-deterministic (H4 ging durch, H3+H8 nicht bei identischer executionState=stalled-warning). Root-Cause: requiresActiveWorkerTerminalGuard() Logic-Edge-Case.

Bug B: admin-close auf non-terminal Task zwingt immer status=canceled, executionState=failed, receiptStage=failed. Keine Option für administrator-override zu status=done bei legitimen successful-but-stalled Cases. Collateral: canceled→done transition explizit blockiert (Illegal transition error).

State-Snapshot: Live-Case 2026-04-20 06:04-06:15 UTC. Admin wollte H3+H8-Forge-Retry Tasks auf done schließen (Code-Fixes verified live in openclaw.json und cost-alert-dispatcher.py), /complete rejected, admin-close erzwang canceled/failed. Board-History zeigt dauerhaft canceled/failed, obwohl Sprint-K-Subs inhaltlich DONE waren. Führt zu False-Negative Sprint-Reports.

Entschieden: Fix beide Bugs in einer Task statt getrennt — sie greifen ineinander (Admin kann derzeit WEDER /complete NOCH admin-close->done nutzen; braucht beides oder ein neues Endpoint).

Offen-Entschieden: Ob neues Endpoint /admin-resolve-as-done ODER Patch der bestehenden Guards. Forge-Empfehlung: bestehende /complete Guard lockern (akzeptiere workerSessionId=none wenn receiptStage in progress/result/failed), PLUS erlaubte Transition canceled→done via explicit admin-flag.

Anti-Scope: Keine neuen Tables, kein Breaking-Change-Schema. Keine Änderungen an /dispatch oder /receipt Route. Nur /complete + /admin-close + getIllegalStatusTransition.

Bootstrap-Hint: /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/app/api/tasks/[id]/complete/route.ts + admin-close/route.ts + /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/lib/task-status-transition.ts + morning-recovery-report-2026-04-20.md section Root-Cause #2.

Prompt-Cache-Prefix-Token-Estimate: 573

Task ID: SPRINT-K-H12-BOARD-STATE-MACHINE-FIX

Objective: Fix 2 Board-State-Machine bugs in mission-control: (A) /complete endpoint requiresActiveWorkerTerminalGuard rejects workerSessionId=none wrongly; (B) admin-close cannot set status=done, canceled→done transition blocked. Enable successful-but-stalled tasks to be closed as done with proper result-metadata.

Implementation-Steps:

1. Read current implementation (~15 min):
   /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/app/api/tasks/[id]/complete/route.ts
   /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/app/api/tasks/[id]/admin-close/route.ts
   /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/lib/task-terminal-guards.ts (resolveWorkerOwnershipConflict, requiresActiveWorkerTerminalGuard)
   /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control/src/lib/task-status-transition.ts (getIllegalStatusTransition)

2. Fix Bug A /complete guard-relax (~30 min):
   In requiresActiveWorkerTerminalGuard(): return false when workerSessionId is null/empty AND receiptStage in [progress, result, failed, blocked]. The original guard existed to prevent concurrent-worker-collision; no collision possible if no active session.
   Test-case: H3-like (workerSessionId=none, executionState=stalled-warning, receiptStage=progress) → /complete should return ok=true.
   Add vitest unit-test: tests/complete-stalled-warning-no-worker.test.ts (workerSessionId=none path returns done).

3. Fix Bug B admin-close status-override (~30 min):
   Option A (empfohlen): Add optional request-body field overrideStatus in admin-close PATCH. Values: 'done' | 'failed' | 'canceled' (default canceled for backwards-compat).
   When overrideStatus='done': set status=done, executionState=done, receiptStage=result, and require resultSummary in body (mandatory field).
   Admin audit-trail: emitTaskLifecycleReport({kind: 'admin-resolve-as-done', reason}).
   Test-case: PATCH admin-close with {overrideStatus:'done', resultSummary:'x'} sets all 3 fields to done/done/result.

4. Fix canceled → done recovery-transition (~15 min):
   In task-status-transition.ts getIllegalStatusTransition(): allow canceled→done iff dispatchState is not 'draft' (proves it was once a real task). This enables recovery for mis-canceled tasks.
   Test-case: PATCH on canceled task with new status=done + resultSummary should succeed.

5. Re-apply done-status on H3+H8-Forge-Retry (~10 min):
   After deploy: PATCH tasks 1b1a5c90 and 55bfa0b2 from canceled to done with proper resultSummary (James' verboseLogging fix + Forge's RATE_LIMIT fix — both already live in code).
   This corrects Sprint-K history from false-negative to accurate-done.

6. Documentation + Report (~20 min):
   Write sprint-k-h12-board-state-machine-fix-report-2026-04-20.md in vault/03-Agents/:
     timeline of the 2 bugs (live-case from morning-recovery-report)
     before/after state diff for /complete and admin-close
     unit-test coverage added
     integration-test (manually) with H3+H8 Forge-Retry re-close
     residual findings

Definition of Done:

- src/app/api/tasks/[id]/complete/route.ts modified with workerSessionId=none bypass (commit verified)
- src/app/api/tasks/[id]/admin-close/route.ts modified with overrideStatus field (commit verified)
- src/lib/task-status-transition.ts allows canceled→done under dispatchState!=draft condition
- 3 new vitest tests pass (npm run test:unit path)
- npm run build green
- H3 task 1b1a5c90 PATCHed to status=done with James-fix resultSummary (verified via /api/tasks/1b1a5c90 GET)
- H8-Forge-Retry 55bfa0b2 PATCHed same
- Report in Vault ls-verified + wc -l
- Git-commit dedicated, preferably 3 separate commits (Bug A, Bug B, transition-allow)
- R35 done nur nach ls-verify + git log
- R45 receipt=accepted within 60s, progress pro Step, result final
- R49 alle claims inline-verified (git log, curl, ls actual outputs)

  - Report-Path (ls-verified)
